tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Send in your guitar chords song request @ 
www.liveloveguitar.com


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
I stay out too late[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Got nothing in my brain[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
That's what people say, mmm[/tab]

That's what people say, mmm
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I go on too many dates[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
But I can't make 'em stay[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]
At least that's what people say, mmm   [/tab]
                  
That's what people say, mmm


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
But I keep cruisin' [/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Can't stop won't stop moving [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
It's like I got this music in my mind[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Saying it's gonna be alright[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              
I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]
Shake it off, I shake it off
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Heart breakers gonna break, break, break, break, break[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
And the fakers gonna fake, fake, fake, fake, fake baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, I shake it off


[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]*
I never miss a beat[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]*
I'm lightening on my feet[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
And that's what they dont' see, mmm[/tab]
That's what they dont' see, mmm
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm dancing on my own (dancing on my own)[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
I'll make the moves up as I go (moves up as I go)[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
And that's what they don't know, mmm[/tab]

That's what they don't know, mmm


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
But I keep cruisin' [/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Can't stop won't stop groovin'[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
It's like I got this music in my mind[/tab]
       G*/mute
Saying it's gonna be alright


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]
Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]

Shake it off, I shake it off

[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I shake it off, I shake it off, I I[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]

[Interlude]
*tap guitar to the beat*
N.C.
Hey, hey, hey, just think 

While you've been gettin' down and out

About the liars and dirty, dirty cheats of the world

You could've been gettin' down to this sick beat


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
My ex man brought his new girlfriend[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
She's like "Oh my God"[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I 'm just gonna shake it[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
To the fella over there with the hella good hair[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]*/mute
Won't you come on over baby we could shake shake shake[/tab]
